welcome: Welcome to Woori, a restaurant with Korean flavors. The name "Woori" means "we" in Korean, and here, everyone is part of our community. Enjoy our Korean dishes!
menu.featured.name: Woori Husman
menu.featured.ingredients: Jeyuk-bokkeum (spicy stir-fried pork), kimchi, ssam salad with ssamjang, bean sprouts, and rice
menu.starters.1.name: Seaweed rolls
menu.starters.1.ingredients: Spicy seaweed rolls filled with glass noodles, chili, and carrots
menu.starters.2.name: Crispy kimchi dumplings
menu.starters.2.ingredients: Crispy dumplings with a flavorful filling of kimchi and pork, served with soy sauce
menu.starters.3.name: Calamares
menu.mains.bibimbap.1.name: Beef bibimbap
menu.mains.bibimbap.1.ingredients: Rice, soy-marinated minced beef, sautéed carrots, zucchini, sugar snap peas, cucumber kimchi, mushrooms, sunny-side-up egg, gochujang sauce, sesame oil, sesame seeds
menu.mains.bibimbap.1.allergens: (Allergens: Soy, gluten, sulfites, sesame, egg, fish)
menu.mains.bibimbap.2.name: Mushroom bibimbap
menu.mains.bibimbap.2.ingredients: Rice, sautéed mushrooms, sautéed carrots, zucchini, sugar snap peas, cucumber kimchi, sunny-side-up egg, gochujang sauce, sesame oil, sesame seeds
menu.mains.korean-fried-chicken.1.name: Sweet spicy
menu.mains.korean-fried-chicken.1.ingred: Chicken thighs (200g), wheat flour, cornstarch, eggs, garlic, black pepper, gochujang, chili powder, soy, nuts, rice
menu.mains.korean-fried-chicken.2.name: Honey soy
menu.mains.korean-fried-chicken.2.ingred: Chicken thighs (200g), wheat flour, cornstarch, eggs, garlic, nlack pepper, soy sauce, honey, oyster sauce, vinegar, sesame, rice
menu.mains.korean-fried-chicken.3.name: Kids' menu
menu.mains.korean-fried-chicken.3.ingred: 2 chicken fillets with rice and sweet chili sauce, wheat flour, eggs, garlic
